{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# PoisonX.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

A Microsoft-signed vulnerable driver used in BYOVD attacks to terminate protected processes, including EDR solutions such as CrowdStrike Falcon. The driver exposes an IOCTL that allows arbitrary process termination from user mode by passing a PID.
- **UUID**: fc3467c3-6109-447d-b438-7a4276c3d8e5
- **Created**: 2026-04-10
- **Author**: Bilal Retiat
- **Acknowledgement**: Jehad Abudagga | [@jehadbudagga](https://twitter.com/@jehadbudagga)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/2cc835399634d1f8f50e465201bfd877.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "PoisonX.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create PoisonX.sys binPath=C:\windows\temp\PoisonX.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start PoisonX.sys
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Kill EDR / Privilege Escalation | kernel | Windows 11 |
